title: TemplateRegistryMeta
description: Meta-schema for registry/template-registry.json. Enumerates all published report-type profiles and their required/optional evidence mappings.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI — should reference this meta-schema.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this registry was last generated.

version.description: Package version this registry was generated from.

entries.description: List of published report-type profile entries.

reportType.description: Unique identifier for the report/transaction type.

path.description: Relative path from the package root to the profile file.

description.description: Short description of the report type.

status.description: Publication status of this report-type profile.

requiredEvidenceTypes.description: Evidence types that must be present for this report.

optionalEvidenceTypes.description: Evidence types that are optional for this report.
